actionable_lessons: Feature engineering should preserve short-horizon market-state context, not just scalar deltas.
Model input quality matters as much as model class.
anti_patterns: Do not jump to deep learning without sufficient clean labeled data.
This does not justify black-box live trading.
body:
Actionable lessons:
- Feature engineering should preserve short-horizon market-state context, not just scalar deltas.
- Model input quality matters as much as model class.

What it does not justify:
- Do not jump to deep learning without sufficient clean labeled data.
- This does not justify black-box live trading.
citation: DeepLOB: Deep Convolutional Neural Networks for Limit Order Books (https://arxiv.org/abs/1808.03668)
summary: Research on learning predictive structure from limit-order-book states with deep models.
title: DeepLOB: Deep Convolutional Neural Networks for Limit Order Books
